diagrams.title: DFA for strings ending with 'ab'
diagrams.description: State machine that accepts strings over {a,b} ending with 'ab'
diagrams.purpose: Understanding DFA construction and state diagram representation

diagrams.title: NFA for (a|b)*ab
diagrams.description: NFA accepting strings ending with 'ab' showing non-determinism
elements: Multiple transitions shown for 'a' from q0
diagrams.purpose: Understanding differences between DFA and NFA transitions

diagrams.title: Transition Table Example
elements: Cells: next state for each combination
Mark initial state with → and final with *
diagrams.purpose: Learning transition table notation and how it corresponds to state diagram

diagrams.title: Subset Construction Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual explanation of converting NFA to DFA using subset construction
elements: Left: NFA with states and transitions
Right: DFA states shown as sets of NFA states
Arrows showing how each DFA state is derived from NFA subsets
diagrams.purpose: Understanding NFA to DFA conversion algorithm

visuals.title: Introduction To Finite Automata
visuals.description: Visual diagram for introduction to finite automata
